title: Women in War
writer: F. Hugh Herbert, Doris Anderson, Barry Trivers
actors: Elsie Janis, Wendy Barrie, Patric Knowles
plot: A "good-time girl", raised by her somewhat lax divorced father, finds herself involved in an accidental death, and the only way she's able to get out of it is to volunteer--albeit reluctantly--to be a nurse in the war effort. She ...
